business_ideas.idea: Plunge: at-home cold plunge device, 100M+ revenue, bootstrapped.
Real Short: scripted romance soap opera short-form video app for US.
Supplement testing and review platform in TikTok format like FlavoCity.
Most trusted supplement verification brand using short-form video.
New age Consumer Reports for supplements, subscription model.

predictions.text: Real Short will succeed where Quibby failed by creating junk food content people love.
Short-form video is now the dominant content format across all platforms.
Supplement testing business can scale to 200M+ revenue like Consumer Reports.
